entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., the crop studied for transpiration and drought adaptation

entities.name: TERMINAL DROUGHT
entities.description: Drought occurring at the end of the growing season that reduces yield

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity of the chickpea crop

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION
entities.description: The loss of water from plant leaves, specifically under high vapor pressure deficit

entities.name: VAPOR PRESSURE DEFICIT
entities.description: The difference between the amount of moisture in the air and how much moisture the air can hold when saturated

entities.name: DROUGHT ADAPTATION
entities.description: The ability of the plant to adjust to drought conditions to maintain productivity

entities.name: ROOT WATER TRANSPORT PATHWAYS
entities.description: The routes through which water moves from the soil through the root cylinder

entities.name: HYDRAULICS
entities.description: The physical properties governing water movement within the plant

entities.name: CONSERVATIVE GENOTYPES
entities.description: Chickpea genotypes that restrict transpiration under high vapor pressure deficit

entities.name: PROFLIGATE GENOTYPES
entities.description: Chickpea genotypes that maintain higher transpiration under high vapor pressure deficit

entities.name: APOPLASTIC TRANSPORT INHIBITORS
entities.description: Chemicals used to block the apoplastic water transport pathway

entities.name: CELL-TO-CELL TRANSPORT INHIBITORS
entities.description: Chemicals used to block the symplastic or cell-to-cell water transport pathway

entities.name: AQUAPORIN INHIBITION
entities.description: The use of inhibitors to block aquaporins, affecting the cell-to-cell pathway

entities.name: ROOT HYDRAULIC CONDUCTANCE
entities.description: A measure of the ease with which water moves through the root system

entities.name: ROOT HYDRAULIC CONDUCTIVITY
entities.description: The intrinsic ability of root tissues to conduct water

entities.name: APOPLASTIC PATHWAY
entities.description: The water transport route through cell walls and intercellular spaces

entities.name: CELL-TO-CELL PATHWAY
entities.description: The water transport route through the cytoplasm and plasmodesmata

entities.name: EARLY VIGOUR
entities.description: The growth strength and rate of the plant during its early vegetative stage

entities.name: SCREENING
entities.description: The process of identifying specific phenotypes using inhibitors
